task_completion.description: Navigate to the Administration menu and open Calendar settings or Categories management.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The screen shows the OpenEMR interface with the 'Administration' menu expanded or the 'Calendar' settings/categories page loaded.

task_completion.description: Enter 'Telehealth Visit' into the category name field.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text input field labeled 'Category Name' or 'Title' contains the text 'Telehealth Visit'.
A numeric input field labeled 'Duration' shows the value '20' (or '0:20').

task_completion.description: Select a color and enter a description for the category.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A color picker is interacted with (showing a specific color code) AND/OR the 'Description' field contains text like 'Video consultation appointment'.

task_completion.description: Confirm the new category appears in the list of available appointment categories after saving.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The list of categories (often a table or sidebar list) displays 'Telehealth Visit' as an existing entry.

integrity.description: Verify the agent is interacting with the OpenEMR web interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a web browser displaying the OpenEMR application, not a terminal or unrelated software.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent did not use SQL commands or backend scripts to insert the data.
integrity.visual_evidence: No terminal windows or code editors are visible executing SQL INSERT statements.

integrity.description: Verify the agent manually filled the form fields.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the form fields being populated or the cursor active within the OpenEMR input fields.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Expected Category Name: 'Telehealth Visit'. Expected Duration: 20 minutes.
